verbatim_text:
OPPORTUNITIES FOR PERSONS WITH DISABILITIES( PwD) 
IN TRAINING AND EPLOYMENT
GOVERNMENT OF INDIA,
MINISTRY OF LABOUR AND EMPLOYMENT, 
DIRECTORATE GENERAL OF EMPLOYMENT, 
NATIONAL INSTITUTE OF CAREER SERVICE, 
NOIDA , UTTAR PRADESH.
July 2024OPPORTUNITIES FOR PwD’s  IN TRAINING AND EMPLOYMENT
INTRODUCTION
 Disability  is described  as impairment  in intelligence,  cognitive  reasoning,  physical  
limitation,  sensory  limitation  etc. which  occur  during  birth  or anytime  during  the lifespan  
of an individual . Persons  with  Disabilities  include  those  who  have  long  term  physical,  
mental  intellectual  or sensory  impairment . According  to NSSO  survey  2018  , about  2% of 
Indian  population  i.e. around  2.68 Cr comprising  1.5 Cr Males  and 1.18Cr Females  are 
PwDs .
The Right  of PwD  Act 2016  mandates  that both  government  and Private  establishment  
reserve  4% Jobs for PwDs .
In order  to provide  Career  oriented  Services  to PwDs , 24 Centers  of National  Career  
Service  Centre  for Differently  abled  erstwhile  known  as Vocational  Rehabilitation  Centre  
for Handicapped  under  Government  of India,  Ministry  of Labour  and Employment  was 
established .
TRAINING OFFERED AT NCSC FOR DA
Non formal  Training - In plant  training : The main  objectives  of of the non- formal  
training  to provide  facility  for acquiring  adequate  skills  to those  disabled  person  
who could  not receive  adequate  education  to enter  formal  training  institutes  such 
as Industrial  Training  Institutes  etc. 
To impart  value  based  and job oriented  vocational  skill for PWD’s  which  in turn 
helps  them  to acquire  jobs or start self-employment  ventures  
PURPOSE  OF TRAINING
❖Evaluation  of Divayangs .
❖Identification  of Employment .
❖Guidance  & Counselling  for gainful  Employment .
❖UpSkill  them  to take up challenges  of life.
❖Eliminate  the social  prejudices  against  Divayangs .
❖Work  for rehabilitation  movement  for Divayangs
ELIGIBILITY ; -
Disability  not less than 40% as per PWD Act. 1995
V .I—Visual acuity not exceeding 6/60 in the better eye. One eyed person is not eligible.
H.I–Hearing loss of 60db or more in the better ear.
OH—Disability not less than 40%. 
MR---IQ Range 51 -70       
SCHOLARSHIP : An amount of Rs 2500/ - per month is provided to trainees 
undergoing training at NCSC for DA Centres.
Document Required -
❖ 2 Passport size Photograph.
❖ Disability certificate, UDID (Unique Disability Identification)
❖ Aadhar Card.
❖ Educational Certificates.
❖ Cast Certificate.

Government  of India has identified  various  job categories  suitable  for persons  with  
disabilities . 
The list extends  from executive  level  (Group  A and B)jobs in administrative,  scientific,  
academic,  and technical  domains  toclerical/secretarial  (Group  C)roles .
It also includes manual  skill (Group  D)jobs like peons,  office  assistants,  bellmen,  and 
cleaners 1.CLASSIFICATION OF JOBS FOR PWDS IN GOVERNMENT SECTOR
Reservations  and Concessions :
The government  reserves 4% of vacancies against  identified  posts  inGroup  C and Group  
Dfor people  with  disabilities  inCentral  Government  Ministries,  Public  Sector  
Undertakings,  and Banks 2.
Rights  of Persons  with  Disabilities  Act, 2016 :
The Department  of Empowerment  of Persons  with  Disabilities has notified 3566  posts in 
Central  Government  establishments  as suitable  for persons  with benchmark  disabilities  
(disability  of 40% and above) . 
For more  detailed  information,  you can refer  to the official  notification  at Office  of Chief  
Commissioner  for Persons  with  Disabilities
NCSC for DA,( VRC ) provide platform to Employers and Divyan  Job Seekers. It works 
as Bridge between them. 
❖PVT. Jobs; - On line & Off line job fairs.
❖Govt. Jobs; - Job registration, Guidance & Counselling for the preparation of job, 
Suggest magazines, books, articles, news papers for intense preparation for the 
competitive exams.
❖Job Portals; - NCS Portal for jobs by Min.Of . Labour.,  Rojgar  Sarathi  by N.G.O. Sarthak, 
Naukri Dot Com.
         OTHER SERVICES OFFERED BY NCSC 
FOR DA CENTRES
•REGISTRATION : Registration  is the maintenance  of records  for the purpose  of 
Employment  in a particular  format  and a live register  to sponsor  PWD’s  against  
reserved  vacancies
•EVALUATION : Evaluation  is a process  through  which  the residual  abilities,  personal  
attributes  of the person  with  disabilities  are scientifically  qualified  and quantified  with  
reference  to their  physical,  mental,  social&  vocational  capacities  to help  the professional  
team  to arrive  at a suitable  vocational  diagnosis . 
•Medical  Evaluation
•Psychological  Evaluation
•Socio -economic Evaluation
•PLACEMENTS : Trained  PwDs  are placed  at different  Sector  through  the conduct  of 
job Fare  and other  placement  activities . Placement  through  Self Employment  
Activities,  Provision  of subsidized  loan  through  Banks  and NHFDC,  Tool  Kits through  
CSR  Fund  of Corporates . 
Source : DGE  and other  related  Websites .

international_framework.instrument: UN Convention on the Rights of Persons with Disabilities (CRPD)
core_obligations: Right to work on equal basis with others
Equal remuneration and safe working conditions

employment_rules: Identification of posts for benchmark disabilities
skill_development_framework: National Skill Development initiatives for PwDs
